name: ADAPt
effect_en: Convert all of your bonus attack damage into ability power at a rate of 1 ability power per ad. Additionally, increase your ability power by 15%.

effect_en: immobilize or ground an enemy champion grants 10 bonus armor and bonus magic resistance for 10 seconds, stacking up to 10 times for a total of 100 bonus resistances, and refreshing on subsequent triggers (5 second cooldown per cast instance).

Each instance deals , with the first instance being applied on-hit}} and the second and third instances dealt each second over the burn's duration. Subsequent attacks against a burning target will only refresh its duration. While [[combat status, you regenerateThis effect counts as a Burn source. Crest of Insight: Grants 10 ability haste. If your champion uses mana}}, if your champion uses energy}}, instead

Additionally, nearby allied champions that use Mark will cause it to drop a snowball on the ground after reaching maximum range or hitting an enemy. You can pick up this snowball to refresh the cooldown of your Mark. This augment is currently disabled.

name: Slow Cooker
effect_en: Surrounds you in flames, causing you to apply a Burn every second to enemy champions within 500 units for 3 seconds that deals magic damage equal to per second.|2% of your maximum health over the duration.}}This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application.

name: Snowball Roulette
effect_en: Hitting an enemy with Mark casts a random harmful summoner spell on them, and also casts a random beneficial summoner spell on yourself. Using Dash casts the beneficial summoner spell on yourself again upon arrival. Additionally, your Mark cooldown is reduced equivalent to 100 ability haste. If Mark is not equipped, you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with Mark.''

name: Symphony of War
effect_en: Gain the Conqueror and Lethal Tempo keystone runes.

name: Tap Dancer
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit}} against enemy champions and minions grant {{as, lasting for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent triggers, and stacking infinitely. Additionally, gain bonus attack speed equal to 10% total movement speed.

name: Transmute: Chaos
effect_en: Gain two completely random augments, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

name: Ultimate Awakening
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability resets the cooldowns of all your basic abilities and grants you 300 basic ability haste for 15 seconds (20 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 30 ultimate haste.

name: Ultimate Revolution
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability resets its cooldown once its effect starts or has elapsed (75 second cooldown, reset upon death).

name: Upgrade Mikael's Blessing
effect_en: Upgrades Mikael's Blessing, reducing the cooldown of Purify to 45 seconds and empowering its active to instead affect you and all nearby allied champions, cleanse all targets of crowd control}} (excluding for 3 seconds. Additionally, you are granted {{ii for free. ''If you already have Mikael's Blessing, gain 2300 instead. If your inventory is full, the item will be granted as soon as a slot in the inventory is available.

name: Windspeaker's Blessing
effect_en: Your or allies' heal and shield on yourself, or your heals and shields on allies, grant the target 30 to 60 bonus armor and bonus magic resistance for 3 seconds.

name: Cerberus
effect_en: Gain the Hail of Blades and Press the Attack keystone runes.

name: Earthwake
effect_en: Dash or blink causes you to leave behind a trail cr from the location you moved to your destination that detonates after 0.75 seconds in a 300 radius, dealing physical damage (+ 125% bonus AD) (+ 60% AP) physical damage per explosion to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against minions}}. Enemies can be affected only once every second from all {{tip, and the effect is not triggered if you move beyond 2000 units with the dash or blink. This augment is only offered to up to 2 players on each team for a given game.

name: Pandora's Box
effect_en: Your current augments transform into an equal number of completely random Prismatic ones.

name: Trueshot Prodigy
effect_en: Upon damaging an enemy while located at over 700 units away at the time of the hit, cast Trueshot Barrage in their direction. The barrage deals magic damage (+ 80% bonus AD) (+ 60% AP) magic damage to enemies it passes through (15 second cooldown). This augment is only offered to up to 1 player on each team for a given game.

name: Slap Around
effect_en: Immobilize or ground an enemy champion grants you 10, stacking infinitely (5 second cooldown per cast instance). Lose 50% of stacks on death.

Your30px|link=Enemy Missing pings will cause you to launch a missile at the pinged location, exploding upon arrival to deal magic damage (+ 10% of target's missing health) magic damage to enemies struck, and heal}} allied champions within for {{pp (+ 10% of target's missing health).

name: Hextech Soul
effect_en: Grants the Hextech Dragon Soul, or a different Dragon Soul if you aleady have it.

name: Infinite Recursion
effect_en: Gain 60 ability haste, increased by 3 each time you score a champion takedown.

name: Bounce of the Poro King
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Bounce of the Poro King. 20px|link= Bounce of the Poro King: geteffect

name: Crack Open That Egg
effect_en: Your shield detonate upon expiration, creating an explosion that deals magic damage equal to 100% of the shield's strength to nearby enemies.

name: Crit 'n Cast
effect_en: Gain ability haste equal to 40% of your critical strike chance.

name: Critical Missile
effect_en: Critical strike against enemy champions launch 1 (+ 1 per Firecrackers at the target that each deal magic damage magic damage. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

name: Devil on Your Shoulder
effect_en: Forge a pact with Teemo, who health resource every second, increased to 5% if there are enemy champions within 1000 units. In return, you deal 20% bonus true damage and your basic attacks and abilities summon a Life Remnant nearby for 5 seconds (0.75-second spawn cooldown). You can absorb a Life Remnant by moving over it, heal you for 50 to 150 (+ 50% bonus AD) (+ 25% AP) and granting you 15% bonus movement speed.

name: Donation
effect_en: Gain 1750 upon acquiring this augment.

name: Double Tap
effect_en: Basic attacks that critical strike apply on-hit}} effects an additional time. Additionally, gain {{as.

name: Dropkick
effect_en: Your basic attacks and abilities execute}} enemy champions below (+ 2% per 1000 bonus health) of their maximum health, which causes their corpse to be sent flying away in a line. Upon collision with an enemy champion or terrain, the target's corpse explodes to deal magic damage (+ 100% bonus armor) (+ 100% bonus magic resistance) magic damage to nearby enemies. Successful executions heal}} you for {{pp (+ 25% bonus health). The execution may also be triggered by the explosion and goes through shields.

name: Droppybara
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Droppybara. 20px|link= Droppybara: geteffect This augment is only offered to up to 1 player on each team for a given game.

name: Empowered By The Faithful
effect_en: Granting a heal}} or {{tip to an allied champion blesses them for 8 seconds. Whenever a blessed ally damages an enemy champion, you generate a stack of Devotion, stacking up to 50 times. Upon reaching maximum stacks, you unleash a shockwave that deals magic damage (+ 750% heal and shield power) magic damage to nearby enemies. Enemy champions damaged below a percentage of their maximum health equal to 25% of your heal and shield power are execute.

name: Final City Transit
effect_en: Upon death, you summon a train over 1 second that launches towards your killer at full speed, travelling in their direction at a global distance and dealing physical damage (+ 65% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP) (+ 15% maximum health) physical damage to enemies it passes through. The train is summoned a slight distance away from the front of your killer, based on their facing direction at the time of your death, and launches towards the position they were located at the time of your death.

name: Firefox
effect_en: Automatically cast a modified version of Fox-Fire, gaining 25% bonus movement speed that decays over 2 seconds and conjuring 3 flames that orbit you clockwise for up to 2.5 seconds at a radius of cr 150 units. The flames will fly toward the nearest sight enemies within cr 550 units, dealing 35 to 160 (+ 25% bonus AD (+ 25% AP) adaptive damage}}, reduced to (+ |30% of the original damage}}for enemies hit by subsequent flames from the same cast (7 second cooldown).

name: Grandma's Chili Oil
effect_en: Your next basic attack or ability hit, or Burn effect, against an enemy champion inflicts them with a Burn that dealsas well as releases a canister of chili from the target that lands to a location near them after 0.75 seconds (3 second cooldown). Upon landing, the canister shatters to create a pool of Chili Oil at the impact area with a radius of 175 units, lasting for 5 seconds. The pool heal you and allied champions within for 30 to 75 upon entering and each second of the pool's lifetime thereafter. While enemies are within the pool, they are dealt 150 magic damage every second. For each unique Burn effect source that you have, up to 10, increase the pool's size by 40 units and its damage per tick by 50 magic damage. The healing per tick is also increased by 25 for each unique Burn effect source that the unit being healed has, up to 10. Healing granted by pools counts as self-healing.

name: Growth Spurt
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Growth Spurt. 20px|link= Growth Spurt: geteffect

name: Heads Up Cupcake!
effect_en: Periodically, Cupcakes will fly across the map. Champions can consume a Cupcake by moving within 300 units of it, heal them and their nearby allied champions for 50 to 250 (+ , as well as slow all targets by 25% for 0.5 seconds. Cupcakes also grant 50 to the champion who consumed it. Additionally, for every 1000 healing done by Cupcakes, you gain 150. Healing granted by Cupcakes counts as self-healing.

name: Holy Snowball
effect_en: After using the Dash spell from Mark, you become invulnerable}} for {{fd seconds upon arrival. Additionally, your Mark cooldown is reduced equivalent to 100 ability haste. If Mark is not equipped, you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with Mark.

name: Triggered Inferno
effect_en: Your damaging basic attacks and abilities against at least one enemy champion}} unique from the previous damaging hit made against champions generate a stack of Style for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent unique or non-unique hits and stacking up to 6 times. For each stack, gain , up to a maximum of ms. Upon reaching maximum Style stacks, you unleash a torrent of shots for 2.25, during which you rapidly shoot at nearby enemies over 2 at sporadic times in 0.2-second intervals each (up to 10 times per enemy), dealing physical damage (+ 40% AD) (+ 25% AP) physical damage with each shot, reduced by 75% against minions}}. Enemies below physical damage}}(15 second cooldown). This effect ends prematurely if you become affected by cast-inhibiting crowd control}}. Shot damage {{tip life steal. Style stacks are consumed at the end of the shooting effect.

name: Juiced
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit}} against enemy champions consume to deal bonus magic damage equal to . This damage can critically strike}} for {{critical damage bonus damage.

name: Kill Secured
effect_en: Gain 60% bonus movement speed towards enemy champions below 40% of their maximum health.

name: Phenomenal Evil
effect_en: Gain Phenomenal Evil Power. Phenomenal Evil Power: Generate a permanent stack of Phenomenal Evil each time you damage an enemy champion with ability damage}}. This effect cannot trigger more than once every second globally and once every 3 seconds from the same {{tip. For each stack, gain 1 ability power. If this is not your first augment, start with 40 Phenomenal Evil stacks, granting you 40 ability power.

name: Pinball
effect_en: Your Mark is empowered to instead throw a pinball, which deals and ricochets off of terrain that it collides with. Each time the pinball ricochets, its remaining travel distance is reset, it increases in radius by 25%, deals 20% increased damage, and reduces Mark remaining cooldown by 30%. The pinball can ricochet up to 4 times, for a maximum radius increase of 100% and a damage increase of 80%. Additionally, your Mark cooldown is reduced equivalent to 50 ability haste. If Mark is not equipped, you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with Mark.

name: Poro Blaster
effect_en: You summon a 20px|link= Poro alongside yourself every 3.5 seconds, up to 5 at a time. Damaging an enemy champion with a basic attack or ability, excluding those which apply persistent damage, commands all of your Poros to launch themselves at the target, each dealing true damage equal to 3% of the target's maximum health. If triggered while at the maximum number of summoned Poros, the first Poro to hit the target also airborne for 0.5 seconds. This augment is only offered to up to 1 player on each team for a given game.

name: Prom Queen
effect_en: Automatically cast a modified version of The Quickness, empowering you to break into a captivating sprint for 6 seconds. While empowered, you gain ghosting}} and {{as, and enemies you collide with are knockdown and become charm for 1.5 seconds (35 second cooldown). A sparkly tiara will descend upon you 2.5 seconds before the effect activates.

name: Purist - Caster
effect_en: Convert all of your bonus attack speed into ability haste at a rate of per 1% bonus attack speed. Additionally, your abilities' total cooldowns are reduced by 10%.

name: Quest: Icathia's Fall
effect_en: Gain Bami's Cinder. You can now purchase Hollow Radiance and Sunfire Aegis in spite of the item limit imposed by Immolate. Quest: Obtain Hollow Radiance and Sunfire Aegis. Reward: Upon completing your Quest, convert the items you obtained for the quest into Void Immolation. Void Immolation counts as 2 Burn effect sources.

name: Red Envelopes
effect_en: Red envelopes will now randomly appear around you every 25 to 15 seconds. You can pick up these envelopes by moving over them, granting you between 8 to 15 and gold gold, and 100 bonus movement speed for 3 seconds. Additionally, whenever you pick an envelope, you gain one of the following stats by random: 5 bonus attack damage5 ability power5 ability haste5 bonus armor5 bonus magic resistance50 bonus health10% bonus attack speed5 bonus movement speed5 Lethality5 magic penetration

name: Shrink Engine
effect_en: Scoring a champion takedown}} generates a stack, stacking infinitely. For each stack, gain {{as and 1% bonus movement speed, and reduce your size by 4%. Lose 65% of stacks on death. Size reduction is capped at 80% (20 stacks).

name: Sonata
effect_en: Alternate between automatically casting a modified version of Aria of Perseverance and modified Song of Celerity, with the former being cast first (10 second cooldown). Aria of Perseverance: Heal}} yourself for 60 for {{fd seconds. Song of Celerity: Gain 30% bonus movement speed for 7 seconds. If you take damage during this time, the duration ends prematurely once or if 3 seconds have elapsed. Additionally, generate an aura that grants tagged allied champions 20% bonus movement speed for 3 seconds.

name: Soul Eater
effect_en: Immobilize or ground an enemy champion grants you 20 bonus health, stacking infinitely (5 second cooldown per cast instance).

name: Speed Demon
effect_en: Whenever you damage an enemy champion with an ability, gain 200 bonus movement speed decaying over 0.75 seconds.

name: Spin Me Right Round
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Heroic Swing (10 second cooldown, starts post-effect). Heroic Swing - Active: You can activate Heroic Swing three times before the ability goes on cooldown, and you can use the third cast only after 0.5 seconds of the second cast. An attack or movement command may be inputted to use the second and third casts. 20px|link= First Cast: Fire a hook in the target direction that embeds in the first terrain hit for 2 seconds. ''Heroic Swing's second cast can be used while the hook is attached. If the hook fails to attach or you become immobilize, ground, or polymorph within the duration, Heroic Swing is cancelled and placed on full cooldown. 20px|link= Second Cast: dash around the terrain in either a clockwise or counterclockwise direction based on the position of the cursor relative to your facing direction, stopping upon colliding with an enemy champion or terrain. While swinging, fire at the nearest sight enemy within 500 units every 0.2 to deal them physical damage (+ 15% AD) (1 + physical damage and apply on-hit}} effects for each shot, with on-hit damage reduced to 25% effectiveness. The dash will be reduces Heroic Swing's'' {{sti to 0.5 seconds.

name: Stats!
effect_en: Gain 2 Stat Bonus.

name: Stats on Stats!
effect_en: Gain 3 Stat Bonus, with a higher chance of obtaining Gold and Prismatic tier anvils.

name: Stats on Stats on Stats!
effect_en: Gain 4 Stat Bonus, with a higher chance of obtaining Gold and Prismatic tier anvils. Additionally, on the next round of augment selection, you gain an additional reroll per augment slot.

name: Stuck in Here With Me
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability grants you an aura for 2 seconds, growing in size over the duration to up to 500 units. After the duration, you taunt}} all enemies within the aura for 2 seconds and gain 50% damage reduction for the same duration (30 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 30 ultimate haste. ''Aura is activated once the ultimate's effect {{tt or has elapsed.''

name: Twin Fire
effect_en: Damaging abilities against enemy champions launch 1 (+ 1 per Firecrackers at the target that each deal magic damage (+ 7% bonus AD) (+ 7% AP) magic damage (5 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 15% critical strike chance.

name: Upgrade Thornmail
effect_en: Upgrades Bramble Vest and Thornmail, empowering Thorns to generate a protective shell around you. The shell is broken by the next enemy champion to use a basic attack on-hit}} against you, which causes them to take magic damage (+ 30% armor) (+ 30% magic resistance) (+ 12% maximum health) magic damage. Shell regenerates after 20 to 5 seconds of being out-of-combat with enemy champions.

name: Virtuous Cycle
effect_en: Your heal grant a shield for 5 seconds that is equal to 20% of the healing value, and your shields grant a heal equal to 20% of the shield's strength. This effect cannot trigger from itself.

name: Void Rift
effect_en: Damaging an enemy champion with an ability summons a Void Scar at the location they were damaged for 6 seconds (0.75-second cooldown per target). If another Void Scar is summoned within 1250 units, through the same condition, both Void Scars are consumed to create a rift to the void between them that converges over 0.6 seconds and has a width of 250 units. Enemies within the rift are dealt magic damage (+ (+ magic damage and slow by 99% decaying over 1 second.

name: Weighted Popoffs
effect_en: Hitting an enemy champion with an ability generates a stack of Popoff for 6 seconds, stacking up to 6 times. For each stack, your basic abilities' cooldowns progress 2.5% faster. At maximum Popoff stacks, this value is doubled, for a total of a 30% faster progression time.

name: Zealot
effect_en: Gain 35% (+ 5% per 100 AP) bonus attack speed and 25% (+ 5% per 100 AP) critical strike chance.

name: Hand of Baron
effect_en: Gain a modified Hand of Baron, which only grants 25% increased adaptive force}} and greatly empowers nearby allied {{tip.

name: Upgrade Sword of Blossoming Dawn
effect_en: Upgrades Sword of Blossoming Dawn, empowering Peppermint to have its healing increased by 250%. Additionally, you gain 100% bonus attack speed.
